description: STING Tools master parameter registry v5.11 — Option-3-B + curation passes 1+2 (full sync to MR_PARAMETERS.txt + tag-container moves + warning threshold values + category_enum_map gap-fill). Moved 96 tag-display stubs from support_params into container_groups (1 new ARCH_TAG group + STR_TAG categories extended); set 8 real warning threshold values with UK AEC source citations (BS 8004 / EC7, BS EN 1992-1-1, BS 7671, CIBSE Guide B3 + G, LETI / RIBA 2030 Challenge, BS EN 806-3); marked 376 non-numeric warnings as check_type=presence; added 3 missing Revit categories to category_enum_map (Toposolid, Hardscape, structural sub-categories, etc.). Phase 183: bound 11 HVAC sizing-registry shared params (HVC_SEGMENT_ROLE/SIZE_PREV/SIZE_MODIFIED/SIZE_RULE_ID/PIPE_SERVICE/PRESSURE_CLASS/SIZE_STALE/REFRIGERANT_KG/REFRIGERANT_TYPE/CAPACITY_KW + PRJ_ORG_PRESSURE_PROFILE).
